ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
btColor = {r=1, g=0, b=0}

function onLoad(en_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if state ~= nil then
        if state.btColor ~= nil then
            btColor.r = state.btColor.r
            btColor.g = state.btColor.g
            btColor.b = state.btColor.b
        end
    end
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=-0.40}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btColor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getGMNotes()})
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=0.40}, scale={0.38, 0.38, 0.38}, color={r=0, g=0, b=0}, width=0, height=0,
        click_function='none', function_owner=self, fontSize=80, label=self.getGMNotes()})
    -- self.addContextMenuItem("캡션 설정", setCaption)
    -- self.addContextMenuItem("버튼색 설정", setBtColor)
end

subst1F = [==[Player[movingPlayerColor].lookAt({position=cameraLocation[tonumber(nextRoom)], pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})]==]
subst1T = [==[Player[movingPlayerColor].lookAt({position=cameraLocation[tonumber(nextRoom)], pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})
        if autoMoveModule ~= nil then
            autoMoveModule.call('autoMove', {steamId = Player[movingPlayerColor].steam_id, nextRoom = tonumber(nextRoom)})
        end]==]
subst2F = [==[Player['Black'].lookAt({position=cameraLocation[tonumber(roomtomove)], pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})]==]
subst2T = [==[Player['Black'].lookAt({position=cameraLocation[tonumber(roomtomove)], pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})
        if autoMoveModule ~= nil then
            autoMoveModule.call('autoMove', {steamId = player.steam_id, nextRoom = tonumber(roomtomove)})
        end]==]
subst3F = [==[cameraLocation[5] = {x = 130, y = -9, z = -150}]==]
subst3T = [==[cameraLocation[5] = {x = 130, y = -9, z = -150}
autoMoveModule = nil
]==]

subst1F2 = [==[Player[movingPlayerColor].lookAt({position=TableFloor[nextRoom].getPosition(), pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})]==]
subst1T2 = [==[Player[movingPlayerColor].lookAt({position=TableFloor[nextRoom].getPosition(), pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})
        if autoMoveModule ~= nil then
            autoMoveModule.call('autoMove', {steamId = Player[movingPlayerColor].steam_id, nextRoom = tonumber(nextRoom)})
        end]==]
subst2F2 = [==[Player['Black'].lookAt({position=TableFloor[tonumber(roomtomove)].getPosition(), pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})]==]
subst2T2 = [==[Player['Black'].lookAt({position=TableFloor[tonumber(roomtomove)].getPosition(), pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})
        if autoMoveModule ~= nil then
            autoMoveModule.call('autoMove', {steamId = player.steam_id, nextRoom = tonumber(roomtomove)})
        end]==]
subst3F2 = [==[pcNameList = {}]==]
subst3T2 = [==[autoMoveModule = nil
pcNameList = {}]==]

guidetext = [=[오른쪽에 생성된 스크립트를
전체복사(Ctrl+A, Ctrl+C)하여
Modding -> Scripting ->
Global Lua에 붙여넣기하세요.
그 후 게임을 저장하면 됩니다.
]=]

local function literalGsub(str, from, to)
    -- gsub 패턴 특수문자 이스케이프
    from = from:gsub('([%(%)%.%%%+%-%*%?%[%]%^%$])', '%%%1')
    -- 교체 문자열의 % 이스케이프
    to = to:gsub('%%', '%%%%')
    return str:gsub(from, to)
end

function userFunction(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    
    local g_script = Global.getLuaScript() or ""
    
    if string.find(g_script, 'autoMoveModule') then
        broadcastToAll('패치가 필요없습니다.')
    else
        local g_script_res
        local count1
        local count2
        local count3
        if string.find(g_script, 'cameraLocation') then
            g_script_res, count1 = literalGsub(g_script, subst1F, subst1T)
            g_script_res, count2 = literalGsub(g_script_res, subst2F, subst2T)
            g_script_res, count3 = literalGsub(g_script_res, subst3F, subst3T)
        else
            g_script_res, count1 = literalGsub(g_script, subst1F2, subst1T2)
            g_script_res, count2 = literalGsub(g_script_res, subst2F2, subst2T2)
            g_script_res, count3 = literalGsub(g_script_res, subst3F2, subst3T2)
        end

        if count1 == 0 or count2 == 0 or count3 == 0 then
            broadcastToAll('알맞은 수정 포인트를 찾을 수 없습니다. 제작자에게 문의해주세요.')
            return
        end
        broadcastToAll('Global 스크립트를 수정하고 저장하세요.')
        self.editButton({
            index = 1,
            label = guidetext,
            fontSize=3
        })
        self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('if', 'text', g_script_res)
    end
end


function onSave()
    local state = {
        btColor = {r = btColor.r, g = btColor.g, b = btColor.b}
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel id="mainPanel" active="false" position="-230 0 -100" rotation="0 0 180" width="800" height="1000" color="#FFFFFF88" scale="0.4 0.4 0.4">
<InputField id="if" width="750" height="950" lineType="MultiLineNewLine" readOnly="true"/>
</Panel>
